name: Bulma Briefs
description:
Yo. The OG DB series...brings back memories.

Plot: A crazed but rich lunatic(Bulma), wants to find mysterious wishing balls, called the Dragon Balls, apparently she wants the perfect boyfriend, and you have nothing to do so you come. After meeting a talking monkey and beating said monkey, Bulma yelling at you and stuff, looking for ballz and talking to pervy old men, your life has been fun...could be more fun.

P.S. I'm running out of ideas...

Hint: You're a nerd in this, because that's what Bulma's friends are, and have taken to human potential, maybe you'll make a Super Yamcha with your Perfect Human project.
creator: 7thArsene
